name: UK Smoking Survey
description: Smoking status by gender, marital status, and education for 1,691 UK residents.

context.nullClaim: smoking status is independent of gender

studyDescription: Data from a survey of 1,691 adults in the United Kingdom. Participants were asked about their smoking status and demographic characteristics. This is an observational study based on survey responses — participants were not randomly assigned to smoke or not.

variableDescriptions.smoke: Whether the respondent is a current smoker (Yes/No)
variableDescriptions.age: Age of the respondent in years

sourceDetail: National STEM Centre. Dataset from OpenIntro (smoking).
